differential_diagnoses: Meconium aspiration syndrome with air leak complications
Post-infectious pneumonia and necrotizing lung disease
next_steps: Perform a chest computed tomography (CT) scan with contrast to delineate airway anatomy and vascular supply
Obtain fiberoptic bronchoscopy to evaluate for endobronchial obstruction or structural anomalies
Consult pediatric thoracic surgery for potential surgical management of persistent focal lung pathology
Continue aggressive management of pulmonary hypertension and maintain optimal ventilator support
Continue microbiological surveillance and optimize antimicrobial therapy based on culture results
